original_image_tags: A dark, likely photocopied or typed page. The main text is in a typewriter font. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, faded capital letters at the top and again near the bottom. Two hole-punch circles are visible on the left margin. A handwritten numeral "131" appears in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Typed text describing a UAP sighting by Albert Samms, including references to 'Incident 60' and 'Incident 60a'. The page contains two large 'RESTRICTED' stamps (one at the top, one at the bottom) and a handwritten number '131' in the bottom right corner. Two hole-punch marks are visible on the left side.
